definitions.text: Forming a circle or closed curve containing (something).
examples: She wore a gold chain around her neck.
I planted a row of lilies around the statue.
We could use some clarification around the new rules.
There has been a lot of controversy around the handling of personal information.

definitions.text: Following the perimeter of a specified area and returning to the starting point.
examples: We walked around the football field.
She went around the track fifty times.
The record store on Main Street? Yes, it's still around.
"How is old Bob? I heard that his health is failing." "Oh, he's still around. He's feeling better now."

definitions.text: So as to form a circle or trace a circular path, or approximation thereof.
So as to surround or be near.
examples: There isn't another house for miles around.
An adult elephant weighs around five tons.
